name: Felsen Cavernborn
equipment: Gabriel's Keg (combat brews) — brewer's supplies proficiency
Backpack, bedroll, mess kit, rations ×10, torches ×10, rope 50ft, tinderbox, waterskin, common clothes
notes: Human Monk 6 — Warrior of Shadow. Focus Points 6 (Flurry, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind). Martial Arts d8; Dex-based Unarmed Strike +6 (Tavern Brawler: 1d4+3 base, reroll 1s, push 5 ft 1/turn). Deflect Attacks (reduce 1d10+9). Stunning Strike DC 13. Empowered Strikes (force damage). Uncanny Metabolism 1/LR. Shadow Arts: Darkvision 60 ft, Minor Illusion, Darkness (1 FP, see inside, movable). Shadow Step (bonus-action teleport 60 ft dim/darkness, adv. on next melee). Shadow Touched: Invisibility + Cause Fear 1/LR each (WIS). Speed 45. CG. Combat brewer; parents lost to the pool (see notes/pc-felson). Imported from D&D Beyond sheet 2026-07-10.
